description: Style NoteThis summer we bring to you a pair of canvas sneakers from barbie that your little princess will not want to take off! Featuring an attractive print and ribbon lacing, this pair is a unique blend of style and comfort. Team it with a frock and a matching hairband for a hot summer day.Product DetailsPink ankle length sneakers with canvas upper for flexibility and durabilityFun print and crystals all over the upper , barbie patch on lateral side of shoePU covering for toe-boxRibbon lacing and zipper for a custom FitPadded footbed with printed fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and heel patchDurable rubber outsole with diamond lugs and grooves for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareCanvas,PUWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
